title: Chicken Caesar Salad
description: Classic Caesar salad with crispy romaine, parmesan, house-made croutons, and grilled chicken.

steps.instruction: Season chicken breasts with olive oil, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Heat a grill pan or skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken 6–7 minutes per side until cooked through (internal temp 165°F). Let rest 5 minutes, then slice.
In a large bowl, toss the romaine with Caesar dressing until well coated.
Add croutons and half the parmesan. Toss again.
Plate the salad and top with sliced chicken and remaining parmesan.
Finish with freshly cracked black pepper and a squeeze of lemon.
